text.openMovementBudget: By reopening the Budget, you will regain control over all actions.
text.openMovementBusiness: By reopening the Business, you will regain control over all actions.
text.closeMovementBudget: By closing the Budget, you will no longer be able to perform any actions until this change is reverted.
text.closeMovementBusiness: By closing the Business, you will no longer be able to perform any actions until this change is reverted.
text.openPurchaseAll: By reopening purchases, you will be able to purchase for all lines and profits will be updated based on the amount spent on each line.
text.closePurchaseAll: By closing purchases, you will no longer be able to purchase for these lines and profits will be updated based on the amount spent on each line.
text.openPurchaseSelected: By reopening purchases, you will be able to purchase for the selected lines and profits will be updated based on the amount spent on each line.
text.closePurchaseSelected: By closing purchases, you will no longer be able to purchase for the selected lines and profits will be updated based on the amount spent on each line.

validationRules.title: Validation Rules
validationRules.description: Configure the validation rules of your organization

step1.title: Create Validation Rule

motivo1.title: They exceed budgeted expenses
motivo1.description: It is triggered when recorded spending exceeds the budgeted amount, generating an alert. It blocks additional transactions until a validator approves the excess, thus ensuring financial control.

motivo2.title: They exceed budgeted expenses
motivo2.description: It's triggered when an expense exceeds the maximum amount set by the user, generating an immediate notification. It blocks additional transactions until the limit is adjusted or manually authorized, helping maintain personalized financial control.

motivo3.title: Issued by
motivo3.description: It's triggered when a purchase is created by a designated user, generating a notification for review. It allows you to monitor and manage specific transactions, ensuring compliance and traceability throughout the process.

warning.autoChangeMessage: If you delete it, these users will automatically be moved to the {guestProfile} profile, which has more limited permissions and may restrict their access

welcome.title: Welcome to unabase!
welcome.text: Let’s take your first steps on unabase together.

main.title: What type of user are you?

card1.title: Individual
card1.text: You are a freelancer and want to use Unabase personally and collaborate with other organizations.

card2.title: Organization Member
card2.text: You belong to a company that uses Unabase

card3.title: Entrepreneur
card3.text: You own a business and want to work with your team on Unabase

roles.title: What are your roles in the industry?
roles.text: Tell us about your work — you can choose more than one role.
roles.text2: This information helps us understand your professional background. You can update your roles anytime later.

placesToWork.title: In which cities do you usually work?
placesToWork.text: Add the cities where you usually work — you can include more than one.
placesToWork.text2: You can update or remove cities later in your profile settings.

project.title: You’re all set! Now, let’s create your first test project
project.text: You’ve finished setting up your organization and personal information.
project.text2: Let’s create a demo project to help you explore how unabase works.
project.text3: A project can include multiple quotes and approved quotes grouped under one main project.

businessArea.label: Choose the business area for this project
businessArea.placeholder: Select one of the business areas you created earlier.

templates.title: Choose a template to start
templates.text: Templates are pre-built quotes designed to match common industry formats.
templates.text2: You can select one for this demo or create your own templates later to fit your business needs.

organization.title: Tell us about your company
organization.text: Later on, you can add other companies to your profile
organization.msgAlert: For the logo, it is recommended to use a square image that does not exceed 5 MB.

alias.label: Alias or Short Name
alias.placeholder: Enter your company’s short name or alias…

logo.label: Upload Logo
logo.error: The image is too large, it must be less than 5MB.

contact.title: Your organization’s contact details
contact.text: Please fill in your organization’s contact details.

members.title: Who is part of your organization?
members.text: Invite members of your organization via email

member.label: Add members to your organization
member.placeholder: Search by name or, if new, add their email
member.error: This user cannot be created because their email is already in use.

businessAreas.title: Your company’s business areas
businessAreas.text: Business areas help you organize your projects and assign permissions by area.
businessAreas.text2: Don’t worry — you can add or remove business areas later in your company settings.

businessAreas.label: Add Business Areas to your organization
businessAreas.placeholder: Search by name or add their email if they’re new
businessAreas.error: This Business Area cannot be created because its name is already in use.

errors.error2: Must be between {count1} and {count2} characters long

configTableExpand.title: Table Columns
configTableExpand.warning: These changes will only be visible on this device.

confirm.despues: in the box and click the NAME_BTN_MAIN button.

modal.title: Do you want to delete the selected items?
modal.description: By clicking on the 'Delete' button, all selected items will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

cancel.despues: in the field and click the {deleteButton} button.

modal.title: Do you want to void the selected items?
modal.description: By voiding the purchase, the record will be kept but will have no effect on system calculations.

variables.despues: in the box and click the NAME_BTN_MAIN button.

modal.title: Do you want to delete the selected items?
modal.description: By clicking on the 'Delete' button, all selected items will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

text.RememberDateFilters: Remember to check the selected date and active filters.
text.mainInUseMessage: This email is already in use.
text.noEsc: Attention! Pressing Esc to exit is not allowed here.

applied.title: Active Filters
applied.label: What name do you want to save these filters with?
applied.placeholder: Enter a name for this filter group
applied.text: You can quickly access this set of filters in the 'Custom Filters' section

actions.folder: Create category at the first position
actions.line: Create line at the first position

category.category: Create Category at the same level as:

options.title: Choose how you want to start your {state}

template.label: Use Template
template.description: Predefined categories, subcategories, and lines with basic information

category.label: Create Category
category.description: The category can contain subcategories and lines

line.label: Create Line
line.description: Standalone line with default values set to 0

alerts.deleteLinesCost: You cannot delete {count} line that already has associated costs | You cannot delete {count} lines that already have associated costs
alerts.noPermissionNewItems: You can only use existing items

deleteLines.title: Are you sure you want to delete all lines? | Are you sure you want to delete the selected line? | Are you sure you want to delete the selected lines?
deleteLines.subtitle: If the selected line has associated costs, you won’t be able to delete it. | If the lines you want to delete have associated costs, you won’t be able to delete them.
deleteLines.customTitle: Are you sure you want to delete the category {category}?

settings.title: Table Settings
settings.text: These changes will only be visible on your device

infoLine.label1placeholder: Enter a description for the line...
infoLine.label2placeholder: Enter an internal note for the line...
